evidence.summary: Modified for explicit self-seeding and BPF state attachment.
Kernel-side LSM hook utilizing inode/dev for allowlisting.

evidence.result: Operation not permitted (EPERM) for all binaries.

evidence.summary: Likely re-armed the BPF LSM during boot before user interaction.

witness_statement: I witnessed the successful engagement of the Arda state, followed immediately by the terminal rejection of all authorized userspace processes. The system became an immutable fortress at Ring-0.
